description: Review & Enhance README.md and bootstrap script with improved clarity, error handling, and network resilience for corporate Mac setups

userStories.title: Audit README.md for clarity and completeness
userStories.description: As a new user, I want clear, accurate documentation so I can set up DotfilesManagerMac correctly on my corporate Mac.
acceptanceCriteria: All prerequisites documented (macOS version, tools, network requirements)
Each setup step matches actual behavior
All error cases have corresponding Troubleshooting sections
Verify DFM-04 compliance (no credentials or internal information)
README renders correctly on GitHub
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add visual decision trees to setup flow
userStories.description: As a first-time user, I want visual diagrams to guide me through setup decisions so I don't get stuck.
acceptanceCriteria: Add ASCII decision tree for 'Fresh Machine Setup'
Add decision tree for 'JAR: already exists vs needs download'
Add quick-reference table for prerequisite tools and versions
Maintain markdown readability (ASCII art, no images)
Decision trees direct to relevant Troubleshooting sections
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add 'Common Setup Failures' quick-reference
userStories.description: As a user facing setup errors, I want a quick lookup table to find my error and its solution immediately.
acceptanceCriteria: Create 2-column table: Error Message → Solution
Include: network errors, permission errors, missing tools, TTY errors
Each row links to detailed Troubleshooting section
Include Zscaler/proxy-related failures
Place prominently in Troubleshooting section
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Enhance bootstrap script with contextual errors and retries
userStories.description: As a user with network issues, I want the bootstrap script to retry failed downloads and explain what went wrong.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement exponential backoff for JAR download (current: fixed 3 retries)
Add contextual error messages distinguishing: network vs permission vs missing tools
Output suggests next steps for each failure type
Log all bootstrap actions to ~/.local/share/dotfiles-bootstrap.log
Improve curl output logging for debugging
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add non-interactive mode for CI/automation
userStories.description: As a DevOps engineer, I want to run bootstrap in automated environments without TTY interaction.
acceptanceCriteria: Add --non-interactive flag to bootstrap script
Use sensible defaults when TTY unavailable (e.g., APEX_JAR_PATH env var)
Skip interactive prompts in chezmoi config
Document CI/automation setup examples in README
Test with GitHub Actions or similar CI system
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Document network-restricted setups (Zscaler, proxies)
userStories.description: As a corporate user behind Zscaler/proxy, I want detailed instructions for getting bootstrap and downloads working.
acceptanceCriteria: Expand Zscaler cert installation section with step-by-step instructions
Add git proxy configuration examples (http.proxy, https.proxy)
Add curl certificate error troubleshooting
Document offline JAR installation (manual download + local path)
Include common error messages for proxy/SSL interception
Typecheck passes
